name: Iter19b — Confetti and excellence banner appear on review page with score >= 90
description: Navigate to the History dashboard and look for any review with a score of 90 or above. Open that review's detail page at /review/:id and verify the gold Excellent Code Quality banner and confetti elements are visible. If no review with score >= 90 exists, analyze a new PR and check — but only assert confetti if the resulting score is 90 or above.

planSteps.description: Verify the reviews history table is visible with at least one row showing score numbers
Look through the score column for any row showing a score of 90 or above and click that row to open the review detail page
Verify the review detail page loads at /review/:id with the full review report visible
Verify the score shown on the review page is 90 or above
Verify a gold or yellow banner containing text like 'Excellent Code Quality' is visible on the review page
